body_text:
21:02 â January 11, 2021
CEBA â Processing Forgivable Principal
We updated the FAQs in the Central 1 Facilitated CEBA Application Procedures Quick Reference Guide, Form 9140.
Q: Once 75% or 66% of the loan is repaid, how do we process the forgivable 25% or 33% to close the loan?
A: When you report payments using the CEBA Repayment form in ServiceNow, you also report the date and amount of the 25% or 33% forgivable amount when you credit your customer. When 75% of $40,000.00 or 66% of $60,000.00 is repaid and 25% or 33% of the forgiven principal is reported, the loan process is complete. ServiceNow will not indicate that a loan is closed/completed as your banking host is the book of record. If your customer wishes to confirm their account status with EDC, they can call the CEBA Call Centre at
1-888-324-4201
.
Your financial institution can email EDC for any program-related questions at
ceba-cuec@edc.ca
.
